Yuki Quincewood is the founder of Orchardbyte Labs. Yuki is exploring a pivot toward the enterprise segment.

Petra Moonstead is the founder of Bramblevolt Co. Petra flagged churn as the top risk in the latest update.

Orchardbyte Labs is a seed-stage company. Founded by Yuki Quincewood. The seed conversation started in 2025.

Quartzgate Capital is an early-stage fund that co-invests on seed rounds.

turns.text: Draft a memo for the partner meeting: Yuki Quincewood and Petra Moonstead both want Quartzgate Capital in the Orchardbyte Labs round.
Make the memo lead with traction, then risks, then the ask.
